title: The road to acceptance: Attitude change before and after the implementation of a congestion tax
authors: Andreas Nilsson, Geertje Schuitema, Cecilia Jakobsson Bergstad, Johan Martinsson, Maria Thorson

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Road pricing charge on entering congested areas, not a tax on carbon content or fuel sales.

inclusion_reason: Studies attitude change toward a congestion tax, but not a carbon tax or fuel tax.
exclusion_reason: Focuses on Gothenburg congestion tax (road pricing), not a direct carbon or fuel tax.
